element_introduction_order.element: Basic movement and belly thrust attack
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental traversal and enemy defeat mechanic
Primary ranged attack and environmental puzzle solving

element_introduction_order.element: Rocks as shields from falling hazards
Small dinosaur enemies spawning from eggs

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Environmental traversal and bonus item access
New enemy type with different behavior
Physics-based puzzle platforming for obstacle bypass
Environmental hazard and slippery terrain challenges
Final world tone and narrative climax building

typical_relief_triggers: Using boulders for safe platform progression
typical_tension_triggers: Limited lives system (three lives, one continue)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty across five themed worlds with modular level introduction of mechanics; tension builds through enemy variety and environmental hazards; relief provided by ally encounters and checkpoint bosses

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Boulders positioned off critical path indicate bonus item areas and optional mastery challenges

difficulty_curve.early_game: Jungle world introduces core mechanics (belly thrust, rock throwing, basic enemy avoidance) in safe, open environments with forgiving enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Cave and Water worlds add new enemy types (spiders), interactive environmental mechanics (brontosaurus riding, crocodile seesaw), and moderate hazard complexity requiring mechanic combination
difficulty_curve.late_game: Ice and Graveyard worlds present environmental hazards (slippery terrain, falling objects), denser enemy encounters, and boss battles requiring mastery of all accumulated mechanics
notable_spikes: Transition from Jungle to Cave world (introduction of spiders)
Ice world hazard complexity (slippery terrain + falling hazards)
Final boss in Graveyard world (narrative climax)

notable_level_patterns.description: Five distinct environments (Jungle, Cave, Water, Ice, Graveyard) each containing 3-5 levels plus concluding boss; thematic consistency aids spatial memory and world comprehension
Early levels in each world introduce location-specific mechanics (boulders in jungle, water hazards in water world) before boss encounters consolidate learned skills
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Jungle World 1-3 progressively introduce rocks, boulders, and flying lizards before boss

notable_level_patterns.description: Boulder positioning and flying lizard placement signal bonus content areas; main path remains accessible without these optional detours
